nodes.label: 38 Spelling Rules
nodes.description: The complete system of English spelling rules — from consonants to advanced patterns

nodes.label: Consonant Rules (1-8)
nodes.description: How consonants behave — softening, doubling, and shield patterns

nodes.label: Rule 1: C → /s/ before E, I, Y
nodes.description: Zero exceptions! CITY, CEILING, CYCLE

nodes.label: Rule 2: G → /j/ before E, I, Y
nodes.description: Tends to soften, but has exceptions: GET, GIFT, GIRL

nodes.label: Rule 3: I, U, V, J never end alone
nodes.description: BLUE (not BLU), GIVE (not GIV), FLY (I→Y)

nodes.label: Rule 4: Double S after vowel
nodes.description: MISS, BOSS, FUSS — not just single S

nodes.label: Rule 5: Double F, L, S, Z
nodes.description: STAFF, BELL, BUZZ — after short vowel in 1 syllable

nodes.label: Rule 6: CK bodyguard
nodes.description: BACK, NECK — CK after short vowel

nodes.label: Rule 7: TCH shield
nodes.description: MATCH, FETCH — TCH after short vowel

nodes.label: Rule 8: DGE shield
nodes.description: BADGE, BRIDGE — DGE after short vowel

nodes.label: Vowel Rules (9-11)
nodes.description: How vowels pair up and Q's partnership with U

nodes.label: Rule 9: AY end / AI middle
nodes.description: PLAY (end), RAIN (middle)

nodes.label: Rule 10: OY end / OI middle
nodes.description: BOY (end), JOIN (middle)

nodes.label: Rule 11: Q always with U
nodes.description: QUEEN, QUARTER — QU = /kw/

nodes.label: Suffix Rules (12-16, 22-28)
nodes.description: How words change when adding suffixes — drop, keep, double, or change

nodes.label: Rule 12: Drop E (vowel suffix)
nodes.description: BAKING, HOPING — drop E before -ING

nodes.label: Rule 13: Keep E (consonant suffix)
nodes.description: HOPEFUL, CARELESS — keep E before -FUL

nodes.label: Rule 14: Double consonant
nodes.description: RUNNING, STOPPING — double before vowel suffix

nodes.label: Rule 15: Consonant+Y → I
nodes.description: HAPPINESS, CARRIED — Y→I before suffix

nodes.label: Rule 16: Vowel+Y stays
nodes.description: PLAYING, ENJOYMENT — keep Y

nodes.label: Rule 22: -ED 3 sounds
nodes.description: /ed/ WANTED, /d/ CALLED, /t/ JUMPED

nodes.label: Rule 23: -ES for hissing
nodes.description: BOXES, BRUSHES — after S, X, Z, CH, SH

nodes.label: Rule 24: Y → IES plural
nodes.description: BABIES, CITIES — consonant+Y → I+ES

nodes.label: Rule 25: -TION / -SION
nodes.description: NATION, TENSION — both say /shun/

nodes.label: Rule 26: -ABLE / -IBLE
nodes.description: COMFORTABLE vs VISIBLE

nodes.label: Rule 27: -AL adjective
nodes.description: ACCIDENTAL, MUSICAL — noun→adjective

nodes.label: Rule 28: -LY adverb
nodes.description: QUICKLY, FINALLY — L+LY=LLY

nodes.label: Silent E Rules (17-21)
nodes.description: The 5 jobs of silent E

nodes.label: Rule 17: Job 1 — Long Vowel
nodes.description: BAKE, DRIVE, FLUTE — E makes vowel say its name

nodes.label: Rule 18: Job 2 — V/U Guard
nodes.description: GIVE, BLUE — words don't end in V or U

nodes.label: Rule 19: Job 3 — Soft C/G
nodes.description: DANCE, LARGE — E keeps C and G soft

nodes.label: Rule 20: Job 4 — Syllable Vowel
nodes.description: CASTLE, TABLE — every syllable needs a vowel

nodes.label: Rule 21: Job 5 — Not Plural
nodes.description: HOUSE, GOOSE — E prevents fake plural look

nodes.label: Shield Rules (29-30)
nodes.description: How letters protect short vowels and soft consonants

nodes.label: Rule 29: I shields C/G
nodes.description: DANCING, MANAGING — I keeps C and G soft

nodes.label: Rule 30: CK/DGE/TCH shields
nodes.description: BACK vs BAKE, BADGE vs CAGE — short vowel protection

nodes.label: Advanced Rules (31-38)
nodes.description: Advanced patterns, silent letters, vowel warping, and borrowed words

nodes.label: Rule 31: O → /u/ before M,N,V,TH
nodes.description: MOTHER, MONEY, LOVE, MONTH

nodes.label: Rule 32: Silent E alternate jobs
nodes.description: HAVE (Job 2), DANCE (Job 3) — not always long vowel

nodes.label: Rule 33: Silent pairs
nodes.description: KN, WR, GN, MB, MN — first letter is silent

nodes.label: Rule 34: Silent L
nodes.description: WALK, CALM — L silent in LK and LM

nodes.label: Rule 35: W warps A
nodes.description: WATCH, WANT — A says /o/ after W

nodes.label: Rule 36: L warps vowels
nodes.description: BALL /awl/, ROLL /ohl/, FULL /ool/

nodes.label: Rule 37: -IGHT pattern
nodes.description: LIGHT, NIGHT — always says /eye-t/

nodes.label: Rule 38: Borrowed words
nodes.description: Greek PH, CH; French CH; Latin TI — foreign patterns
